LeCun, Yann, Yoshua Bengio, and Geoffrey Hinton. “Deep Learning.” Nature 521 (2015): 436–44.

Reis, Harry T., and Charles M. Judd, eds. Handbook of Research Methods in Social Psychology. Cambridge University Press, 2000.
Rodriguez, Maria. “Major Breakthrough in Quantum Computing Announced.” Science. The New York Times, March 15, 2024.

Smith, John, Alice Lee, Bao Nguyen, and Ravi Patel. “Adaptive Climate Risk Modeling for Inland Regions.” Journal of Climate Analytics 12, no. 3 (2021): 201–19.
Spinoza, Baruch. Éthique. Jan Rieuwertsz, 1677.

“The Role of Theory in Research.” Journal of Theoretical Psychology 28, no. 3 (2018): 201–15.

Vaswani, Ashish, Noam Shazeer, Niki Parmar, et al. “Attention Is All You Need.” Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems 30 (2017): 5998–6008.
